required_preferences.fact: Requests hotel rooms with pools or stationary bikes—completely avoids any treadmill or gym equipment requiring weight-bearing exercise

supersedes.fact: Books hotel rooms with fitness centers on work trips—never relies on outdoor running due to plantar fasciitis

required_preferences.fact: Closely tracks sodium intake during work travel, choosing only low-sodium meal options—even avoids many previously healthy pre-orders if sodium content is too high

supersedes.fact: Pre-orders healthy meals for travel days—never eats fast food at airports

required_preferences.fact: Reads nutrition labels meticulously before purchasing any groceries—now avoids packaged foods high in sodium
Logs every meal and snack in a dietary tracking app daily to monitor sodium and improve accountability
Limits weekend coaching involvement with his kids’ soccer teams to accommodate mother-in-law’s appointments and rehabilitation sessions—now sometimes skips matches to oversee her care
Prepares detailed talking points for every client education event—never improvises presentations on the spot

persona: A mid-level sales manager at a multinational pharmaceutical company
